posts.title: Virginia mail-in ballots were +45 Yes.

quotedTweet.content: Democrats won this referendum on the strength of their Mail-in-vote margin.  While it was only 11% of the vote so far, it was an astonishing and almost inexplicable Yes +45.  That translates to about 5 points on the overall margin, which is more than the Time’s estimated Yes +3.3

Why do we think the voting begins in September? Because time is needed to collect them from “low propensity” people who wouldn’t go vote otherwise.

posts.raw_content:
Zoom out from the Virginia gerrymander...

When you look at the big picture... the way that the Uniparty has been relentless in attempting to destroy Trump and suppress MAGA without addressing the actual problems that created the MAGA movement. It's pretty clear to me that this ends in violence. 

The big question is who will be controlling the military when this occurs.

I suspect that if the Uniparty retakes government that their promised retribution will not be box cars, but more like the J6 witch hunt. Any effective or potentially effective dissent will be criminalized. Similar to what the Canadians did to the Truckers, anyone supporting dissent will be punished through the instruments of social control. And as with Covid, there will be a forcing mechanism to make people declare their loyalties so that even sympathizers can be identified. 

I think that the best bet for MAGA is to find their own forcing mechanism so that the Uniparty has no choice but to drop the mask and is forced to fight from a position of relative weakness. What would this look like? I suspect that the SPLC indictment is the beginning of the real game, the equivalent of taking your opponent's e5 pawn after building a structure of supporting pieces to attack it. The utility of a lawfare approach will be limited by the interlocking layered defense of activist federal judges like Boasberg and institutionalists like Thune and Roberts. 

The solution would be some sort of forking move, one that compels the Uniparty into a Hobson's choice where they have to choose between preserving plausible deniability and preserving power. It has to cause a crisis which forces them to cross a clear line into unlawful opposition. Perhaps Styer becomes the next California governor and follows through with his threat to arrest ICE agents. Instead of a measured response, like taking the case to SCOTUS, Trump could meet this provocation with a maximalist response, invoking the insurrection act to declare martial law and start mass arrests of Deep State assets. This would neuter the judiciary and unleash direct kinetic conflict, which would favor the side in direct control of the military chain of command.

Is Trump going to do this. Seems hard to imagine. But who knows? Betting against him is a fool's game but it seems equally unwise to smoke the hopium while your enemy's forces are massing under the cover of darkness. 

I think many people on the right feel this in their bones and are making ready. Despite this, just as many are in willful denial and will be surprised when the balloon goes up.
